subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The detailed letter dated 18 Jumada al-Awwal 1325 was received and carefully read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مکتوب مفصل بتاریخ ۱۸ جمادی الاول ١۳۲۵ وصول یافت و بدقت قرائت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @Ottoman commissions of investigation
